name: Baked Fish with Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions, green pepper, celery, garlic, and parsley to the pan. Cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in blended tomatoes and bay leaves. Season with sugar. Simmer for approximately 1 hour.
4. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
5. Coat a roasting pan with olive oil.
6. Season the fish fillets with salt and pepper.
7. Place fish fillets in the prepared roasting pan, surrounded by cut-up potatoes.
8. Pour the tomato sauce over the fish and potatoes.
9. Bake for approximately 1 hour, basting every 15 minutes.
